mapper.query:
INSERT INTO checkouts (
    token,
    email,
    phone,
    name,
    updated_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{2.token}}',
  '{{2.email}}',
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ifempty(2.phone; 2.shipping_address.phone)}}'), ''),
  '{{ifempty(2.shipping_address.name; 2.shipping_address.company)}}',
  now()
)
ON CONFLICT (token)
DO UPDATE SET
    email = EXCLUDED.email,
    phone = EXCLUDED.phone,
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    updated_at = now();

UPDATE checkouts
SET
    phone_received_at = CASE
        WHEN phone_received_at IS NULL AND phone IS NOT NULL
        THEN now()
        ELSE phone_received_at
    END
WHERE token = '{{2.token}}'
  AND phone IS NOT NULL
  AND phone_received_at IS NULL
RETURNING token, phone, name;
